name: Szechuan Shrimp- Gwhp32a
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine scallions (or green onions), bamboo shoots, ginger, garlic, and pepper sauce in the hot oil.
2. Add sugar, catsup, sherry, soy sauce, and sesame oil to a separate bowl. Mix cornstarch with water in another small bowl.
3. Heat some oil in a wok or skillet. Add shrimp (cut into smaller pieces if large) and stir-fry until done (about 2 minutes). Drain the shrimp and set aside along with the reserved oil.
4. Heat 1 1/2 tbsp of oil in the same wok, add the scallion mixture, and stir-fry for about one minute.
5. Add the shrimp back into the wok.
6. Stir fry for an additional 30 seconds, then add the catsup mixture.
7. Continue stirring for another 30 seconds before adding the cornstarch mixture.
8. Cook until slightly thickened.
9. Serve with steamed rice.
